## Affiliate / Referral Links

**Does the submitted link contain an affiliate or referral code?**
- [ ] No *(required — PRs with affiliate/referral links will be closed)*

## Duplicate Check

- [ ] I have searched the README and confirmed no similar entry already exists.
- [ ] I have checked open and closed PRs and this is not a duplicate submission.
- [ ] I have not submitted other products from the same company in recent PRs.

---

## Description Quality

- [ ] My proposed README description is **one neutral sentence** (no marketing superlatives such as "best", "#1", "all-in-one", "AI magic", "revolutionary").

**Proposed description:**  
<!-- Paste the exact line you want added to the README, following the existing format: [Tool Name](URL) \n > One neutral sentence. -->

## Contributor Acknowledgement

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and my submission meets all the stated criteria.
- [ ] I understand that PRs not meeting the standards will be closed without merging.
